decision_policy: Skinned/imported/animated humanoid evidence is necessary but not sufficient for final humanoid art readiness.

checks.meaning: M96 can only review existing route, visual, ledger, built-player, and weapon-feel evidence.
Approved player/enemy evidence includes skinned/imported rendered humanoids.
Skinned/imported/animated evidence is present and tracked separately from final art quality.
Route-level enemy character silhouette is visible under gameplay lighting.
Helmet and vest equipment have route-visible approved pickup evidence.
Generated player/enemy humanoid assets must be category-correct, gameplay-bound, and production-promoted.
Generated helmet/vest gear must be category-correct, gameplay-bound, player-camera visible, and production-promoted.
Idle/animation-state, combat interaction, and down/restart evidence exists.
Aim/fire/hit evidence exists through weapon feel metrics and route screenshots.
Humanoid evidence is tied to gameplay route and external-input built-player evidence.
Humanoid/gear evidence is visible from gameplay/player-camera captures.
Final humanoid/gear art quality must be explicitly approved in docs/M96_FINAL_HUMANOID_ART_REVIEW_APPROVAL.json; import, animation, silhouette, or route visibility alone is insufficient.

blockers: generated_character_assets_final_ready: Generated player/enemy humanoid assets must be category-correct, gameplay-bound, and production-promoted.
generated_helmet_vest_gear_final_ready: Generated helmet/vest gear must be category-correct, gameplay-bound, player-camera visible, and production-promoted.

explicit_final_humanoid_art_quality_review_passed: Final humanoid/gear art quality must be explicitly approved in docs/M96_FINAL_HUMANOID_ART_REVIEW_APPROVAL.json; import, animation, silhouette, or route visibility alone is insufficient.

Full visual completion still needs final first-person hero weapon art review, final humanoid art/retarget quality review, and remaining class-by-class promotion of generated GLBs. Current RealifiedAssets audit: 27 promotable, 21 textured probes, 27 sidecar-promotable; crate scene instances 0, container scene instances 0, gear scene instances 0, loot scene instances 156, weapon scene instances 163. Current approved character GLBs now contain skin, animation data, and an authored tactical detail kit, but the humanoid art is still an intermediate tactical import rather than a final production character.
character evidence is route-level intermediate production credit, not final commercial humanoid quality
player_tactical and enemy_tactical generated assets are still blocked in the gameplay promotion ledger.
